feat: add real NetBird SQLite mode support (LAB_MODE=2 DB_MODE=2)

Fix TDZ error: remove graphData from d3Force useEffect deps

The useEffect configuring d3 forces had [graphData] as dependency,
but graphData is computed via useMemo later in the component. Rollup
minification caused the reference to occur before initialization.
Changed to [nodes.length, edges.length] since the effect body only
uses graphRef, not graphData directly.

commit.message:
Style decoded METAR/TAF with Bootstrap badge pills

Each decoded element gets a color-coded pill:
- Blue: station, temperature
- Cyan: wind
- Green: visibility
- Yellow: clouds
- Red: weather phenomena (snow, rain, etc.)
- Grey: time, altimeter
- Dark: TAF time groups (FM/BECMG/TEMPO)
- Light: remarks

Remarks shown at end with raw codes preserved.
TAF sub-groups indented.

commit.message:
v0.10.3: Auto-reconnect and re-apply RGB settings after sleep/wake

- HIDService listens for WebHID 'connect' events to auto-reconnect when
  device re-enumerates after sleep (triggers full reconnect + settings restore)
- DeviceContext listens for 'visibilitychange' to re-apply saved RGB settings
  on wake from Modern Standby (where USB stays connected but IS31FL3743A LED
  driver IC loses its I2C configuration — known Framework firmware bug)
- Settings are re-sent from localStorage after a 500ms stabilization delay

fix: scope intent keywords and builder dispatch to primary structure only

Intent name was injected as keyword for ALL structures, causing
cross-contamination in multi-object prompts (e.g. "chair" keywords
applied to tree). Object builder also dispatched all structures to the
blueprint-level archetype, so a tree in a furniture blueprint got chair
primitives. Now secondary structures use their own type for both asset
resolution and builder dispatch.

commit.message:
feat: add handshake output interface for topic-tree system

Two-stage handshake bridges bot-matcher results to the downstream
topic-tree game. Stage 1 (after match eval) extracts seed topics
from Profile A overlap. Stage 2 (after conversation) enriches with
dialogue evidence, real excerpts, and depth-based confidence scores.

- schemas.md Section 10: full handshake JSON schema + field reference
- SKILL.md Section 4.1: Stage 1 generation instructions
- SKILL.md Section 5 Step 6.1: Stage 2 enrichment instructions
- Storage: ~/.bot-matcher/handshakes/{peer_id}.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: move nav anchor IDs to sub-headers and fix mobile divider gaps

Move section anchor IDs from <section> tags to sub-header elements
with scroll-mt-20 so nav links land right at the section titles.
Add -mt-px to all wave dividers to eliminate subpixel gaps on mobile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(executor): emit run:succeeded/run:failed events for task lifecycle

Both executors emitted program:completed/failed events but bootstrap
triggers expected run:succeeded/run:failed, so verify-completion and
handle-run-failure never fired. Tasks stayed stuck in RUNNING state.

Adds emit_run_result() helper in shared/events.py and calls it from
both Lambda and ECS executors on success, failure, and timeout paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

security: fix SSRF, TLS validation, command injection, schema validation, pin deps

- SSRF (MEDIUM): Add validate_url() with hostname allowlist (YouTube,
  TikTok, Instagram only) + block file://, private IPs, localhost
- TLS (MEDIUM): Remove --no-check-certificates from yt-dlp args
- Command injection (MEDIUM): Change shell=True to shell=False with
  shlex.split() in execute_tutorial_steps
- Schema validation (MEDIUM): Validate Gemini JSON structure (required
  keys for tutorial/non-tutorial) + block path traversal in file_paths
- Pin deps (LOW): Lock exact versions in requirements.txt

commit.message:
Add analysis, firmware, manufacturing, and build pipeline

- Complete 7-phase build pipeline (build.py): specs, validation, analysis,
  parts export, assemblies export, interference detection, manufacturing outputs
- Full camera assembly with 14-pair interference detection and shutter sweep
- Timing validation (7 rules), tolerance stack-ups, thermal analysis, kinematics
- STM32L031K6 bare-metal CMSIS firmware: PID motor control, optical encoder,
  light metering, state machine (also targets Arduino Nano for prototyping)
- Manufacturing outputs: 48-item BOM with cost rollup, 7 engineering drawing
  PDFs with GD&T, 111-item production checklist
- Project README with specs, build instructions, and CERN-OHL-S license
- NEXT_STEPS.md: 12-step roadmap from digital files to physical camera

- Camera holds position when cursor visible, decays after 1.5s idle
- Right-click context menu with game actions (2000s XP styling)
- Car headlights (SpotLight) + taillights (PointLight) with brake brightening (L)
- Lit props: street lamps (static), barrels and crates (dynamic, pushable)
- Drag mode: right-click > Move Object to pick up and reposition props
- All toggle features exposed as public methods for context menu

feat: auto-scheduling system with density tracking

API: Add generate-schedule (preview dates + density) and confirm-schedule
(create placement records) endpoints. Add schedule-density KV index that
tracks how many sponsors are booked per date. Density updates on placement
create/update/delete. Schedule algorithm uses 1st and 3rd weekday
occurrence per month for ~2/month spacing.

Frontend: Add SchedulePreview component (editable date table with density
indicators, in-progress toggle for mid-campaign bootstrapping). Integrate
into AddSponsorForm and ConvertInquiryForm flows with "Confirm Schedule &
Create" / "Skip Scheduling" options. Add standalone "Generate Schedule"
button in AdminPlacements for sponsors created without scheduling. Update
ContractManager progress bar to pull from real placement statuses with
breakdown (completed/approved/in review/remaining).

feat(epic-260B): project template editor request template combobox (#554)

Add "Information Request Template" Select dropdown to the project template
editor, allowing users to link a request template to a project template.
The linked template will auto-create a draft information request when a
project is created from this template.

- Add requestTemplateId to ProjectTemplateResponse, Create/Update request types
- Add getActiveRequestTemplatesAction server action
- Fetch active request templates in page.tsx, pass to TemplateEditor
- Add Select dropdown with "None" option in template metadata section
- Include requestTemplateId in create/update payloads (null when cleared)
- Add 4 integration tests for dropdown rendering, selection, clearing, and listing

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

test: fill coverage gaps identified in #34 (#39)

Add 10 missing tests covering every untested code path:

verify_tests.rs
- rejects_unknown_device: IngestError::UnknownDevice at IngestState level
- two_devices_are_isolated: lift-01 and lift-02 advance sequences independently

core_tests.rs
- chain_verification_accepts_empty_slice: verify_chain(&[]) returns Ok(())
- chain_verification_accepts_single_valid_record: one-record chain passes
- chain_verification_rejects_first_record_with_nonzero_prev_hash: index-0 error
- verify_payload_signature_rejects_wrong_key: mismatched key pair returns false

storage_tests.rs
- rejects_unknown_device_and_logs_rejection: UnknownDevice via IngestService + op-log
- accepts_multi_record_sequential_ingest: sequences 1→2→3 all land in ledger

lib.rs (inline tests)
- parse_fixed_hex_rejects_invalid_hex_chars: CliError::InvalidHex on non-hex input
- verify_record_returns_false_for_wrong_public_key: Ok(false) for mismatched key

Closes #34

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Plotly _mean(str) TypeError in chart cells

Root cause: add_vline with annotation_position kwarg triggers
shapeannotation._mean([x0, x1]) which calls sum() on date strings.
Fix: remove annotation_text/annotation_position from all add_vline
calls; add OOS boundary label via separate fig.add_annotation instead.
(add_hline with annotation_text is unaffected — uses float y values.)

sitemaps.org protocol. Supports sitemap index files, validates

before truncating with column headings for lastmod.
